goal_text:
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should 'arrive by 15:30'.
The train should depart from 'norwich' and should leave on 'wednesday'.
Make sure you get 'departure time' and 'travel time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should arrive by 15:30
The train should depart from norwich and should leave on wednesday
Make sure you get departure time and travel time
